title: Crumbling Codex
author: Krümblegård
pages:
§6§lWhat Is This?

§7You have discovered a tear in reality.

§7§aWayfall§7 is a fractured void realm of
floating islands, living stone, and
reactive terrain.

§7Progress here leads to §5Runic craft§7…
and something far worse.

§6§lEntering Wayfall

§7Enter using:
§7• A §aWaystone§7 (rare pull for
  first-time visitors)
§7• The §aWayfall Portal§7 (Creative)

§8────────────

§7Tip: hold §lShift§r§7 when using a
Waystone to avoid the pull.

§7You will always land safely on a
spawn island.

§6§lFirst 10 Minutes

§7When you arrive:
§7• Gather §aFault Dust§7
§7• Harvest §aRunegrowth§7
§7• Cut §aWayfall wood§7
§7• Farm §aPaleweft Corn§7 → §aWeftkern§7
§7• Watch the stone (dormant §5Traprock§7)

§6§lFood & Farming

§7§aPaleweft§7 grows across Wayfall.

§7Turn it into a steady food loop
and stock up on §aWeftkern§7 early.

§7If you can farm, you can explore.

§8✧ ✧ ✧

§6§lMobility

§7§aScaralon Beetles§7 can be tamed
and ridden.

§7They can §lfly§r§7.

§7They can lay eggs.

§7§lElytra are renewable here.§r

§5§lRunic Path

§7Runic Debris
  §8↓
§7(§osmelting / blasting§r§7)
  §8↓
§7Runic Scrap
  §8↓
§74× Runic Scrap + 4× Copper
  §8↓
§7Runic Ingot
  §8↓
§7Netherite Ingot + Runic Ingot
  §8↓
§5Attuned Ingot

§5§lThe Warning

§7Something rules Wayfall.

§7It has phases.

§7It remembers you.
